name: clean lung screening CT — Lung-RADS 1, baseline

report.indication: Baseline low-dose CT lung cancer screening, asymptomatic high-risk smoker.
report.technique: Low-dose non-contrast CT of the chest with 1 mm reconstructions.
report.findings: Lungs: no discrete pulmonary nodule. No consolidation. No mediastinal or hilar adenopathy. Heart size normal. No pleural effusion. Visualised upper abdomen limited in evaluation but without focal abnormality.
report.impression:
1. Negative low-dose CT lung cancer screening.
2. Lung-RADS 1.
